data.title: Meta Platforms Suffers Major Outage: Facebook, Instagram And Other Apps Down For Thousands
data.description: Several applications across the Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META) family of products began experiencing problems on Wednesday. Meta is aware of the issue, but several apps were still down at the time of writing.
